description: Phase 15: Play Store Submission Prep — Build AAB, privacy policy, health permissions rationale screen, freemium gate enforcement, Play Store listing metadata, and final polish

userStories.title: Create Health Permissions Rationale screen (Google Play requirement)
acceptanceCriteria: Read Google Play health data policy requirements
Create lib/features/health/presentation/screens/health_permissions_rationale_screen.dart
Screen explains WHY each health permission is needed (not just what)
Lists each permission with icon and user-friendly description:
- Steps: 'Track daily activity and set movement goals'
- Heart Rate: 'Monitor recovery and calculate training readiness'
- Sleep: 'Optimise rest and adjust tomorrow's plan'
- Weight: 'Track body composition progress toward your goals'
- Exercise/Distance/Calories: 'Personalise workout plans and calorie targets'
- Body Fat: 'Fine-tune nutrition recommendations'
Screen shown BEFORE requesting Health Connect permissions (not after)
Continue button triggers actual permission request
Decline button shows explanation that app works with limited features
Register route at /health/permissions-rationale in app_router.dart
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Google Play requires a rationale screen for apps using Health Connect. This must be shown before the system permission dialog. Navigate here from onboarding or settings when permissions not yet granted.

userStories.title: Verify and enforce all freemium gates
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/freemium/ for gate logic
Verify these features are gated (require PRO):
- Recovery score display
- AI daily plan generation
- VO2 max forecasting
- Meal plan generation
- Unlimited history (free = 7 days only)
- Insights dashboard
- Heart Healthy / Low Carb nutrition pages
- Voice Log and Meal Scan
- AI bloodwork interpretation
Verify these features are FREE:
- Health Connect sync
- Basic meal/workout logging
- 7-day history view
- Habit tracking
- Basic step/weight tracking
Free users see what they're missing (not hidden, just locked)
All gate checks use currentPlanTierProvider
Tapping locked feature navigates to /paywall via context.push()
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Gate logic in freemium_gate_widget.dart. Some gates use Navigator.push internally — verify all use GoRouter context.push('/paywall'). Check every screen/widget that should be gated.

userStories.title: Remove all debug print statements and console logging of sensitive data
acceptanceCriteria: Search entire codebase for print() and debugPrint() statements
Remove all debug print statements from production code
Known issue: onboarding_flow_screen.dart has debug prints (from memory)
Verify no sensitive data (tokens, passwords, health values) in any log output
Replace necessary logging with AppLogger (structured, filterable)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use grep for 'print(' and 'debugPrint(' across lib/. AppLogger is at shared/core/utils/app_logger.dart. Keep AppLogger calls for important error paths.

userStories.title: Fix all flutter analyze warnings and info messages
acceptanceCriteria: Run flutter analyze on entire project
Fix all errors (must be 0)
Fix all warnings (should be 0 for Play Store)
Fix info-level issues where practical (unused imports, unnecessary casts)
No deprecated API usage
flutter analyze returns 0 errors, 0 warnings
userStories.technicalNotes: Run: cmd.exe /c 'cd agentic-mobile-template && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos'. Fix systematically — unused imports first, then type issues, then deprecations.

userStories.title: Verify AndroidManifest.xml has all required permissions and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Read android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
All Health Connect read permissions declared (steps, heart_rate, sleep, weight, exercise, distance, calories, body_fat)
POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission for Android 13+
SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM for reminder scheduling
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED for reminder persistence
Health Connect intent filter on activity
health_permissions.xml resource file exists with all permission strings
Internet permission declared
Deep link intent filter for welltrack:// scheme (OAuth callbacks)
No unnecessary permissions declared
userStories.technicalNotes: Read android/app/src/main/res/values/health_permissions.xml too. Cross-reference with CLAUDE.md Phase 1 requirements.

userStories.title: Configure release build signing and build AAB
acceptanceCriteria: android/app/build.gradle has release signing config
keystore.jks exists (or upload.keystore.jks for Play App Signing)
key.properties referenced correctly (not committed to git)
key.properties in .gitignore
minSdk = 28, targetSdk = 34 (or latest required)
Build command succeeds: flutter build appbundle --release --dart-define-from-file=.env
AAB file generated at build/app/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab
AAB size reasonable (< 150MB)
userStories.technicalNotes: Play Store requires AAB not APK. Must pass --dart-define-from-file=.env for Supabase credentials. Do NOT commit keystore or key.properties. If signing not set up, create key.properties template.

userStories.title: Create privacy policy page content
acceptanceCriteria: Create a privacy policy document covering:
- What health data is collected (steps, heart rate, sleep, weight, exercise, etc.)
- How data is stored (Supabase with RLS, encrypted tokens)
- What AI processing occurs (server-side only, never client-side)
- Sensitive data handling (bloodwork, sexual health metrics — encrypted, consent-gated)
- Third-party integrations (Garmin, Strava — OAuth, what data flows)
- Data retention and deletion rights
- Contact information for data requests
Privacy policy URL must be live before Play Store submission
Add privacy policy link to settings screen
userStories.technicalNotes: Privacy policy can be a static HTML page hosted on GitHub Pages, Supabase Storage, or a simple web host. Play Store requires a URL, not an in-app document. Also add link in app for transparency.

userStories.title: Add app icon, splash screen, and Play Store listing assets
acceptanceCriteria: App icon set for all Android densities (mdpi through xxxhdpi)
Adaptive icon with foreground and background layers
Splash screen with app logo (uses flutter_native_splash or manual)
Feature graphic (1024x500) for Play Store listing
At least 2 phone screenshots (1080x1920 or similar) for Play Store
Short description (80 chars max) written
Full description (4000 chars max) written
App category: Health & Fitness
userStories.technicalNotes: If flutter_native_splash is in pubspec.yaml, configure in flutter_native_splash.yaml. Screenshots can be generated from device or emulator. Feature graphic can be designed in Canva or similar.

userStories.title: Verify offline-first behavior works correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/sync/sync_engine.dart
App launches and shows cached data when offline
Meal logging works offline (saved to Hive, synced later)
Workout logging works offline (saved to Hive, synced later)
Habit toggle works offline (saved to Hive, synced later)
When connectivity returns, sync engine pushes pending changes
Conflict resolution: server wins for health metrics, client wins for user-entered data
No crash or unhandled exception in airplane mode
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Check sync_engine.dart and conflict_resolver.dart. WorkManager must be registered for background sync. Hive boxes should have pending sync queue.

userStories.title: Verify notification service works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/reminders/data/notification_service.dart
NotificationService.initialize() called in main.dart after Supabase init
Notification channel created on Android
Timezone database initialized (tz.local set)
POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission requested on Android 13+
Creating a reminder in app schedules a device notification
Notification fires at the scheduled time
Tapping notification opens the relevant screen (meal log, workout, etc.)
Reminders survive app restart
Reminders reschedule after device reboot (RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
Verify on Android device
userStories.technicalNotes: Phase 13 US-001 initialized the notification service. This story verifies the full end-to-end flow including reboot persistence. Check flutter_local_notifications configuration.

userStories.title: Run full regression test on all major flows
acceptanceCriteria: Signup flow: email/password -> onboarding -> dashboard (no stuck screens)
Login flow: existing user -> dashboard with real data
Health Connect: permissions granted -> data syncs -> metrics visible in dashboard
Morning check-in: complete 5-step flow -> Today's Plan screen shows personalized plan
Meal logging: search food -> log -> macro progress updates
Workout session: start -> log sets -> complete -> summary screen
Habit tracking: toggle habits -> streak increments -> milestone fires at threshold
Bloodwork: add result -> out-of-range flagged -> AI interpretation (with consent)
Goals: create goal -> projection chart renders -> milestone notification
Settings: all toggles work, logout works, Health Connect connect/disconnect works
Navigation: all bottom nav tabs work, back buttons work on all screens
Freemium: locked features show paywall, free features accessible
No crashes during any flow
userStories.technicalNotes: This is a manual regression test checklist. Run through each flow on a real Android device (Samsung SM S906B). Note any issues for follow-up fixes.
